edgeCases: gofmt exits 0 so check-fmt.sh forces exit 1 on non-empty gofmt -l output
unreadable-state chmod 000 fixture skips when os.Geteuid()==0 (root) and restores 0644
missing vs unreadable vs invalid-JSON state are three distinct Load outcomes, asserted separately
coverage key position invariant: between mobileFirst and handoffTo, byte-compared vs evidence.MarshalJSON
context hook never breaks the session on bad config: returns nil and injects config warning line
statusline hook cannot carry a warning line; deferred by design, context hook covers visibility
